{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Huan
| aliases = Huan, Emperor Naru Huan
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[wind madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, fighting against Blackflame}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Emperor, Overlord}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Jai Patriarch|Patriarch]], sole leader of the Blackflame Empire}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|, Emperor Naru the Second}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru clan]], [[Blackflame Empire]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emperor's cloudship]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Naru Huan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru]] Huan is the Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]] and the current ruler of the [[Blackflame Empire]], holding the titles of Emperor, Overlord, and Guardian of the West and Protector of the East. His clan ascended to the throne approximately fifty years ago following the decline of the original [[Blackflame family]]. As a leader, he possesses a commanding presence and is characterized by his large, shimmering emerald wings associated with the [[Path of Grasping Sky]]. Physically, he is described as a muscular man with a square jaw, piercing eyes, and a short beard. In his political role, [[Naru]] Huan manages the administration of the empire and navigates complex diplomatic relations with various clans and powerful entities, such as the [[Akura clan]] and the [[Arelius family]]. He oversees a hierarchy of Underlords and maintains authority through both imperial etiquette and his significant spiritual power. While he often maintains a formal, heroic mask of leadership, he also shares personal connections with individuals like [[Eithan]]. His reign has been marked by efforts to manage national crises, defend territories, and seek guidance from higher powers like [[Sages]] and [[Monarchs]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is [[the Emperor]] and has reached the Overlord stage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] could have assigned [[Eithan]] as the temporary guardian of the western territories while the [[Jai]] dissolved into infighting.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] uses wind madra to cushion a glass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is the Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]] and the sole leader of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Emperor Naru]] the Second.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] nodded after thinking for a moment.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Emperor Naru]] Huan has emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Huan]] is [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Emperor Naru]] Huan's weapon is a long, straight-bladed [[sword]] made of black glass.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Huan is [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Huan intends to put [[Eithan]] to work.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|While aboard the [[Emperor's cloudship]], the Overlord [[Naru]] Huan remained hovering in midair after offering greetings. He had recently received word from his sister regarding the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. To prepare for combat, he utilized several sacred weapons specifically designed to fight [[Blackflame]], a force against which he is highly practiced. Ultimately, [[Naru]] Huan became involved in a massive battle at the Overlord level.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is aboard the [[Emperor's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] remained hovering in midair after greeting them.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]]'s sister sent him word from the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is practiced in fighting against [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] possesses several sacred weapons designed for fighting [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emperor Naru]] Huan is involved in an Overlord-level battle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"My sister sent me word from the Uncrowned King tournament as soon as she could, but I heard nothing from you."<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
